title: Survey pests
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Survey pests demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to conduct survey

pcs.text: Access and interpret pest management plan, survey strategy and monitoring program documents according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access and interpret pest management plan, survey strategy and monitoring program documents according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access and interpret pest management plan, survey strategy and monitoring program documents according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Map location and boundaries for the count and obtain required permits
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Map location and boundaries for the count and obtain required permits?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Map location and boundaries for the count and obtain required permits.

pcs.text: Work with key stakeholders to develop trust and effective working relationships
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Work with key stakeholders to develop trust and effective working relationships?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Work with key stakeholders to develop trust and effective working relationships.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify natural areas and features?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify natural areas and features.

pcs.text: Confirm location of habitats and the range of movement of the target pest
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm location of habitats and the range of movement of the target pest?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm location of habitats and the range of movement of the target pest.

pcs.text: Determine items of direct evidence of the pest to be counted and survey method
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine items of direct evidence of the pest to be counted and survey method?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine items of direct evidence of the pest to be counted and survey method.

pcs.text: Determine time and duration of the count and notify relevant personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine time and duration of the count and notify relevant personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine time and duration of the count and notify relevant personnel.

pcs.text: Identify safety hazards and take precautions to minimise risks associated with the selected survey method
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify safety hazards and take precautions to minimise risks associated with the selected survey method?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify safety hazards and take precautions to minimise risks associated with the selected survey method.

pcs.text: Identify environmental risks and take precautions to minimise risks associated with the count
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify environmental risks and take precautions to minimise risks associated with the count?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental risks and take precautions to minimise risks associated with the count.

pcs.text: Check serviceability of resources required to complete the count
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check serviceability of resources required to complete the count?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check serviceability of resources required to complete the count.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to conduct survey

elements.title: Conduct survey and record observations

pcs.text: Operate equipment according to workplace procedures and operator instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Operate equipment according to workplace procedures and operator instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Operate equipment according to workplace procedures and operator instructions.

pcs.text: Conduct count within boundaries of specified location
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct count within boundaries of specified location?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct count within boundaries of specified location.

pcs.text: Record observations of direct evidence of the target pest and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record observations of direct evidence of the target pest and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record observations of direct evidence of the target pest and report to supervisor.

pcs.text: Clean and store equipment and materials according to workplace practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and store equipment and materials according to workplace practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and store equipment and materials according to workplace practices.

pcs.text: Apply animal welfare policies and procedures when conducting survey
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply animal welfare policies and procedures when conducting survey?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply animal welfare policies and procedures when conducting survey.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Conduct survey and record observations

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
